calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Philip Werner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Universal Underwriters Insurance Company.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Michael Witt, the general manager, the Court rules in foavor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Victor Alexander Morton as follows:
Damages $40,562.00
Costs $339.50, for a total of $40,901.50
Judgment signed in open court.
